name: @karasu-tools/vscode-e2e
description: VS Code extension host smoke tests for the karasu extension

scripts.pretest: pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/core run build && pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/lsp run build && pnpm --filter karasu-vscode run build && pnpm run build
scripts.test:webview: pnpm run pretest && cd ../vscode && extest setup-and-run -s ../vscode-e2e/test-resources -m ../vscode-e2e/tests/webview/.mocharc.json '../vscode-e2e/out/webview/**/*.test.js'
